provenance.derivation: frozen S6 boundary projection joined exactly to S5 and release-qualified by O1

unit_edge_normalization: regular tetrahedron embedded as the standard simplex in R4; all R4 squared distances are divided by 2

published_atomic_delta_squared_certifica.definition: sum unit-edge-normalized squared lengths of non-coplanar boundary edges in the barycentric boundary triangulation, without merging adjacent collinear segments
published_atomic_delta_squared_certifica.source_role: the unique replay lane that exactly reproduces all 15 admissible T2 appendix rows

maximal_reflex_boundary_profile.definition: merge connected elementary intervals only when supporting line, unordered oriented incident supporting-plane pair, and exact reflex/cosine class all agree
maximal_reflex_boundary_profile.source_role: P18-local exact boundary fingerprint resolving the published maximal-merge wording for nonconvex rows
limitations: not the published T2 appendix table

published_source_mismatch.statement: the T2 paper says maximal collinear segments are merged, but the appendix values are reproduced by the atomic lane only

literal_line_only_rejection.reason: a connected collinear component may change its incident planes and exact dihedral class
